use_cases: Display user profile pictures in blog post author bylines
Show user avatars in comment sections and discussion threads
Render profile images in card headers and navigation menus
Display user identity in dashboard and settings pages
Support user representation across various content types
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible Avatar component built on Radix UI's Avatar primitive. Provides three sub-components—Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback—for flexible user profile picture rendering with automatic fallback to initials. This atomic component uses Tailwind CSS for minimal styling and serves as a building block for the hover blog card and other user-identity UI elements across any industry application.
